name: development-flow-basic
description: Skill runs full development flow for an In Progress issue
expected_behavior: Announces it is using the /senior-developer skill
Reads issue and detects In Progress status
Assesses current state: branch, dev plan, PR, analysis
Presents assessment and asks for confirmation
Creates task list via TodoWrite with all 12 standard tasks
Pre-completes tasks that are already done based on assessment
Posts development plan to issue after user confirmation
Creates feature branch with issues/<N>-<description> naming
Runs full test suite and shows raw output
Enforces test gate — does NOT commit until tests shown passing
Commits and pushes to feature branch
Posts structured completion comment with PR link and test output
